---
name: Query Improvement
about: Suggest improvements to a query's SQL or results
title: "[Query] "
labels: query improvement
assignees: ''
---

**Query affected:**
Link to the Dune query (e.g., https://dune.com/queries/1234567)

**File in repo:**
Path to the SQL file.

**Suggested improvement:**
What would improve the query? (e.g., additional columns, better filtering, performance optimization, new metric)

**Additional context:**
Why is this improvement valuable?
